channel.title: Microfinance on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Microfinance on Pi Stack

item.title: Apache Fineract Self-Hosted Microfinance Platform: Complete Deployment Guide 2026
item.description: Microfinance institutions, credit unions, and cooperative banks need specialized software to manage loans, savings accounts, client portfolios, and regulatory reporting. While commercial core banking systems cost tens of thousands of dollars, Apache Fineract provides a fully open-source alternative that you can self-host for free.
